chapter_title: Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles
text:
(a) When the department issues a permit under this subchapter, the department shall issue a sticker to be placed on the front windshield of the truck-tractor. The department shall design the form of the sticker to aid in the enforcement of weight limits.

(b) The sticker must:

(1) indicate the expiration date of the permit; and

(2) be removed from the truck-tractor when:

(A) the permit for operation of the truck-tractor expires;

(B) a lease of the truck-tractor expires; or

(C) the truck-tractor is sold.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 623. Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles
##### § 623.407 — Permit Sticker

(a) When the department issues a permit under this subchapter, the department shall issue a sticker to be placed on the front windshield of the truck-tractor. The department shall design the form of the sticker to aid in the enforcement of weight limits.

(b) The sticker must:

    (1) indicate the expiration date of the permit; and

    (2) be removed from the truck-tractor when:

        (A) the permit for operation of the truck-tractor expires;

        (B) a lease of the truck-tractor expires; or

        (C) the truck-tractor is sold.

*Added by Acts 2017, 85th Leg., R.S., Ch. 108 (S.B.1524), Sec. 3, eff. January 1, 2018.*
